_warning: PDF text extraction mangles digits in this document (22,224 -> '222222', 69 -> '96', 34° -> '340'). These values were transcribed by eye from the rendered pages, NOT by text extraction. Re-verify against the rendered pages before trusting any edit.
_scope: Firing zones only, Atlit southward to the Ashdod line, per Alex 2026-07-17. Port security areas and zones south of Ashdod are deliberately excluded.
